# VidKraftr

> Script-first AI video generator for faceless content creators

VidKraftr turns ideas into viral faceless videos for TikTok, YouTube Shorts, Instagram Reels, and Facebook Reels. Unlike other AI video tools, VidKraftr uses a script-first approach: AI writes an optimized viral script with hooks, pacing, and emotional triggers, then automatically builds the video around it.

## Core Features

- **AI Script Generation**: Describe any topic → get a platform-optimized viral script with a virality score in seconds
- **Automated Video Pipeline**: AI splits scripts into scenes, matches HD stock footage from Pexels, adds text overlays and transitions, renders a finished vertical video
- **Inspiration Mode**: Paste any viral video URL → auto-transcribe → AI analyzes what made it viral → generate a new script using the same patterns for your niche
- **Style Cards**: Save and reuse visual styles from videos you admire
- **Multi-Platform Support**: Optimized for TikTok, YouTube Shorts, Instagram Reels, Facebook Reels (9:16 vertical format)
- **Virality Score**: Every AI-generated script includes a virality prediction score so you only render high-potential content

## Who It's For

- Faceless YouTube channel creators
- TikTok content monetizers
- Social media agencies managing multiple accounts
- E-commerce brands creating product videos
- Anyone who wants to create short-form video content without a camera or editing skills

## Pricing

- **Free**: $0/mo — 5 scripts, 2 videos per month, basic templates
- **Pro**: $39/mo — Unlimited scripts, 20 videos per month, all platforms, style cards & inspiration analysis
- **Team**: $119/mo — Everything in Pro + shared brand kit, priority rendering, API access
